case_title: STATE OF CALIFORNIA EMPLOYMENT DEVELOPMENT DEPT. vs. LEACH, CARL J.

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF STATE OF CALIFORNIA EMPLOYMENT DEVELOPMENT DEPT. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LEACH, CARL J. $1,200.28 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,280.28

EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT LEACH, CARL J.
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF STATE OF CALIFORNIA EMPLOYMENT DEVELOPMENT DEPT.
SUMMARY JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF STATE OF CALIFORNIA EMPLOYMENT DEVELOPMENT DEPT. AS TO DEFENDANT LEACH, CARL J.
REIMBURSEMENT PER 6103.5 GOV.CODE. DEPOSITED BY PLAINTIFF STATE OF CALIFORNIA EMPLOYMENT DEVELOPMENT DEPT.
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $1,344.41 AS TO DEFENDANT LEACH, CARL J.
